name: Holo Files
summary: The native file explorer for Hologram OS one window onto the whole verified object universe, plus your writable OPFS home. Feels native on every OS.

description.p: A file explorer where every object is a self-verifying UOR object: its name IS its content address (Law L1), and a tampered byte re-derives to a different κ and is refused (Law L5).

Serverless browse the OS's content-addressed graph, every holospace's sealed closure, and the OS-wide runtime, with O(1) content-addressed lookup. Your Home is a real, writable OPFS namespace, kept private on this device; the wider content-addressed graph is addressable by its κ (a κ is an address, not a secret).

ul: A faithful Files-community experience: sidebar locations, breadcrumb address bar, Details / List / Tiles / Grid / Columns views, a details pane and tabs
Auto-detects the host OS and wears its native chrome Finder on macOS, File Explorer on Windows, Files on Android/iOS, Files/Nautilus on Linux
Every file carries its did:holo κ and re-derives on demand (verifiable, gateway-free)
Read-only over the immutable substrate; full read/write in your OPFS Home
